action.reasoning: Observation: 1/60 success rate. predict.py was truncated at _action_to_ee method. The action bridge had delta clipping at ±0.05 (too conservative), rotation handling was broken, and gripper mapping was binary. Analysis: The action bridge is the primary bottleneck - even with good model outputs, the robot can't move effectively with ±5cm delta limits and broken rotation. Also need to retrain for more epochs (current 2-epoch LoRA is undertrained). Decision: (1) Write complete predict.py with better action bridge (larger deltas, proper rotation via from_rotvec, continuous gripper), (2) Retrain for 5 epochs, (3) Submit eval.
